channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Canada Considers Expanding Legal Definition of Sexual Deepfakes Amid Parliamentary Debate
item.description: Canada’s Justice Minister, Sean Fraser, expressed willingness to broaden the legal definition of sexualized deepfakes as Parliament prepares to review Bill C-16. The legislation seeks to update the Cr...

item.title: How to Save on Rising Health Insurance Premiums
item.description: The rising cost of living has hit household budgets hard, with private health insurance premiums climbing an average of 4.41% since April, and some gold cover plans rising by up to 25%. Many people ac...

item.title: Four individuals arrested for drug trafficking at OR Tambo over three days
item.description: Over the past three days, OR Tambo International Airport has seen the arrest of four individuals in connection with drug trafficking. On Tuesday, the South African Police Service (SAPS), with assistan...

item.title: High healthcare expenses limit Filipinos' ability to prioritize health
item.description: Healthcare costs continue to be a major barrier for many Filipinos in maintaining a healthy lifestyle, even as awareness of the importance of health grows. Experts highlighted that financial constrain...

item.title: Paramedics assist in unexpected in-flight childbirth on Oregon-bound flight
item.description: During a commercial flight heading to Oregon, a mother unexpectedly went into labor earlier than anticipated. Flight attendants quickly alerted paramedics who were either on board or met the plane upo...

item.title: Ugandan Woman Arrested After Faking Pregnancy and Stealing Baby
item.description: In Mubende District, Uganda, police recovered a three-week-old baby boy, Dillan Sentume, who had been stolen from his mother, Janet Ainembabazi, after she briefly stepped out to buy household items. I...

item.title: Federal Probe Targets Pasadena Clinic for $34 Million Medicare Skin Graft Fraud
item.description: Federal authorities have seized more than $2 million from Expert Wound Care, a Pasadena clinic also known as St. Victoria Home Care, amid an ongoing investigation into Medicare fraud. The clinic alleg...

item.title: Brighton and Hove Albion announces plans for Europe's first dedicated women's football stadium
item.description: Brighton and Hove Albion Football Club has revealed plans to construct a stadium dedicated entirely to women's football, marking a historic first in Europe. The initiative reflects the growing promine...

item.title: Canadian Prime Minister Carney to participate in European Political Community summit in Armenia
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney is scheduled to attend the European Political Community summit in Yerevan, Armenia, from Saturday to Monday. This marks the first time Canada has been invited as a non-Europ...

item.title: Understanding How Seasonal Allergies Affect the Body
item.description: Seasonal allergies occur when the immune system mistakenly identifies harmless pollen as a harmful invader, similar to a parasitic worm. This process, known as sensitisation, can develop over several ...

item.title: First Observation of Matter-Wave Diffraction in Positronium
item.description: Researchers from Tokyo University of Science have achieved a significant milestone in quantum physics by observing wave-like interference in a beam of positronium for the first time. Positronium, an e...

item.title: Dividend Season in Nigeria: How to Start Investing in Stocks with Small Money
item.description: Dividend season dey here again for Naija as companies wey close their accounts for December dey now share profits with shareholders between January and May. The article explain say when you buy shares...

item.title: Innovative Eco-Friendly Restaurant in Tamil Nadu Made from Recycled Materials
item.description: In the port city of Tuticorin, Tamil Nadu, Indian architecture studio Wallmakers has transformed twelve discarded shipping containers into an eco-conscious restaurant named Petti. The containers were ...

item.title: Analysing Political Violence and Divisions in the US
item.description: In the aftermath of the shooting at the White House correspondents’ dinner, tensions in US politics have escalated, with former President Donald Trump and the current White House administration pointi...

item.title: Justin Arana Leads Converge to Key Wins in PBA Season 50
item.description: Justin Arana has once again proven his value in the PBA, earning the Player of the Week award for his outstanding performances that helped Converge secure crucial victories. In the recent games of the...

item.title: Kalonzo Files Court Case to Halt Government Sale of Safaricom Shares
item.description: Wiper Party leader Kalonzo Musyoka has taken legal action to stop the government from selling its 15 percent stake in Safaricom to South Africa's Vodacom. He has filed a petition at the High Court see...

item.title: Philippine Peso Hits Record Low Amid Middle East Tensions, Impacting Imports and Inflation
item.description: On April 28, 2026, the Philippine peso fell to a historic low of P61.30 per US dollar, reflecting continued global uncertainties caused by the conflict in the Middle East. Earlier in February, the pes...

item.title: Rajnath Singh meets Chinese and Russian Defence Ministers at SCO to discuss West Asia and bilateral ties
item.description: Defence Minister Rajnath Singh held discussions with Chinese Defence Minister Admiral Dong Jun on the sidelines of the Shanghai Cooperation Organisation (SCO) Defence Ministers’ meeting in Bishkek. Th...

item.title: EuroMillions and Thunderball results for Tuesday 28 April 2026
item.description: The EuroMillions lottery draw took place on Tuesday 28 April 2026 with a jackpot of £23 million following another rollover. To claim the top prize, participants needed to match all five main numbers p...

item.title: Top Canadian-Made Gifts for Mother's Day 2026
item.description: With Mother's Day approaching on May 10, Canadian shoppers can find thoughtful, locally-made gifts that are both practical and indulgent. Vancouver brand Mala offers the Mimosa Candle, a 100% vegan an...
